## Summary

<!-- Briefly explain what this pull request changes. -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] `feat` — new user-facing feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation-only change
- [ ] `style` — formatting-only change
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructuring without behavior change
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `test` — tests
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, dependency, or maintenance
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD change
- [ ] `build` — build system change

## Conventional PR Title

<!--
Use Conventional Commit style for the PR title:

<type>(optional-scope): <short summary>

Examples:
feat(object-remove): add mask-based object removal workflow
fix(upload): reject unsupported image formats earlier
docs(readme): update localized README links
refactor(job): simplify queue reservation flow
-->

```txt
type(scope): summary
```
